textByHash.9a845f68d0ca5e1e9f724ba4a9ac3e275975e7ce: Hello. I'm Paul, the Ironman tutor. What can I do for you?
textByHash.6d513f199311677e1d1495674465c5da97d68f77: Hail! What can I do for you?
textByHash.5707f56234e9523e08ff81e7291604f3e2b1c3c9: When you play as an Ironman, you do everything for yourself. You don't trade with other players, or take their items, or accept their help.
textByHash.a4552448a24ce2dad14ed1199f17b5324f7fb73a: As an Ironman, you choose to have these restrictions imposed on you, so everyone knows you're doing it properly.
textByHash.b8c52136ced2ffc0a3fb2df004c51e5713e36b2b: If you think you have what it takes, you can choose to become a Hardcore Ironman.
textByHash.d22c8675b99ebd07838565bca8f905ffd5b02b3f: In addition to the standard restrictions, Hardcore Ironmen only have one life. In the event of a dangerous death, your Hardcore Ironmen status will be downgraded to that of a standard Ironman, and your
textByHash.96664fe0664a909ca65c24fcc57ff6832a385bba: stats will be frozen on the Hardcore Iron man hiscores.
textByHash.6fe1a4bdebcb0c5156c96990efe7bcbb834fc94e: If you have some friends, you could stand alone... Together, as Group Ironmen. Group Ironmen have the same restrictions as regular Ironmen except you can trade your items with each other!
textByHash.46317693f120df6c32bbcc65a615c70db966611f: If you are a daring bunch, you could even try Hardcore Group Ironmen. With Hardcore Group Ironmen you have a set number of lives, when they reach zero, you will become regular Group Ironmen.
textByHash.e86a888c6ee5596d3aa776c4684bc3762abddedd: If you ever decided to invite experienced players to your group, you would become Unranked Group Ironmen, which are no longer shown on the Group Ironman hiscores.
textByHash.a8426cb3f09fc7a8b25da344d33279dd0b6ba01c: For the ultimate challenge, you can choose to become an Ultimate Ironman, a game mode inspired by the player IronNoBank.
textByHash.a397b663ce6ceecc89cf0c1cb6307ba92a22ad23: In addition to the standard restrictions, Ultimate Ironmen are blocked from using the bank, and they drop all their items when they die.
textByHash.29e8a2796a84ea0074db9025101278e7946172e6: While you're on Tutorial Island, you can switch freely between being a standard Ironman, an Ultimate Ironman, a Hardcore Ironman, a Group Ironman, a Hardcore Group Ironman or a regular character.
textByHash.bf3588f1715dd1624ae77855a6eaff6e83f3ad29: Once you've left this island, you'll be able to find my colleague Adam in Lumbridge, but he'll only let you switch your restrictions downwards, not upwards.
textByHash.94a73932c70c8ded652fb58933378e054fd5cc77: So he will let Hardcore Ironmen or Ultimate Ironmen downgrade to standard Ironmen, and he'll let all types of Ironman become normal players.
textByHash.d99b240aa189afb94ed9f94441456f7fe4356e7d: I must warn you that Ironman mode is not recommended for new players. You can still give it a go if you think you're up for the challenge though.
textByHash.30ed9148e3f1c913aeff44d63f1f51a1803fc502: Make sure you've got your Ironman settings all sorted before you leave Tutorial Island. Some things can't be changed later.
textByHash.a170309a8bd3c9326b08e37e8114b3975e731564: Hello. I'm Adam, the Ironman tutor. What can I do for you?

textByHash.29cfc3b911f48bb1d1806b460ddcd5b387186cce: stats will be frozen on the Hardcore Iron Woman hiscores.
textByHash.6646f248290dae22d09815b4998c6fc557396108: If you have some friends, you could stand alone... Together, as Group Ironmen. Group Ironmen have the same restrictions as regular Ironwomen except you can trade your items with each other!

textByHash.0303e55f22a295f097c9ccef68c850b3ec4a7899: Sorry, Iron Man mode isn't available on Deadman worlds.
textByHash.b487d900c9aeecfbb3669e1d01ca077339b36c28: Hello there. Everyone taking part in the Leagues II - Trailblazer is under Iron Men restrictions once they leave Tutorial Island.
textByHash.180e50daf9e802a8ed5aea54ea56cedb9416d089: Hello there. Everyone taking part in the Leagues II - Trailblazer is under Iron Women restrictions once they leave Tutorial Island.
textByHash.cfadf1ef4e82b909dff09687d72bd76c00bd42ac: I need you to help me with this.
